qa_pairs.question: What are the names of the general-purpose clusters provided by the Alliance?
qa_pairs.answer: The general-purpose clusters provided by the Alliance include Béluga, Cedar, and Graham.

qa_pairs.question: Who has automatic access to a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) award on general-purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: By default, every role sponsored through an Alliance CCDB registration and any co-Principal Investigators (co-PIs) listed on the RAC application will have access to a RAC award on general-purpose clusters.
